name: @rune-langium/curated-mirror-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker (Cron-triggered) that mirrors curated Rune model archives (CDM, FpML, rune-dsl) into R2 nightly. Studio fetches from the mirror instead of cloning at runtime (feature 012-studio-workspace-ux).
author: Pradeep Mouli <pmouli@mac.com> (https://github.com/pradeepmouli)
